title: SEBI ने Research Analysts के Audit के लिए Cost Accountants को भी Eligible किया
content:
# SEBI ने Research Analysts के Audit के लिए Cost Accountants को भी Eligible किया

Ek important update hai! Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) ne Research Analysts (RAs) ke annual compliance audit ke liye auditor eligibility expand ki hai. Ab Cost Accountants (members of the Institute of Cost Accountants of India - ICMAI) bhi ye audit conduct kar sakte hain.

Pehle, annual audit sirf Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) aur Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) ke members hi kar sakte the. SEBI ne ICMAI se representations milne ke baad aur relevant Regulations ko consider karte hue, yeh change kiya hai.

**Key points:**

*   **Eligibility Expansion:** Members of the Institute of Cost Accountants of India (ICMAI) are now eligible to conduct the annual compliance audit of Research Analysts.
*   **Circular Details:** This clarification has been issued vide SEBI Circular No. HO/38/12/12(1)2026-MIRSD-SEC-FATF/I/7934/2026.
*   **Date of Issue:** The circular is dated March 25, 2026.
*   **Effective Date:** The provisions of this circular are applicable from its date of issue.
*   **Audit Requirements:** Research Analysts or entities must conduct the annual audit within six months from the financial year-end and submit the report to RAASB/SEBI within one month of the audit report, but not later than October 31st of each year for the previous financial year. Audit findings and corrective actions must also be disclosed on their website and shared with clients.

Yeh move compliance, transparency, aur investor protection ko strong karega Research Analyst ecosystem mein.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.sebi.gov.in/legal/circulars/mar-2026/clarification-regarding-eligibility-of-members-of-the-institute-of-cost-accountants-of-india-to-conduct-annual-audit-of-research-analysts_89304.html)

*Published on: 27 March 2026*
